window_summary: This window tracks the recent release evolution of lizongying/my-tv, an Android TV app, covering versions from v1.6.7 to v2.1.8 with features like channel list style switching, playback fixes, and UI improvements.

chunks.title: Release v1.7.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.7.2
Tag: v1.7.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-16T05:22:50Z; created_at: 2024-03-16T05:14:14Z
Release notes:
通用
* 支持节目列表网格样式和行样式切换，软件重启后生效
* 节目列表样式变更
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.2, the update supports switching between grid and row styles for the program list, which takes effect after restarting the software, and includes a change to the program list style.

chunks.title: Release v1.6.7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.6.7
Tag: v1.6.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-18T10:34:24Z; created_at: 2024-03-18T10:29:56Z
Release notes:
安卓5及以上专用
* 手机双击打开配置
* 自动更新
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.6.7, which is dedicated to Android 5 and above, double-clicking on the phone opens the configuration, and automatic updates are supported.

chunks.title: Release v1.6.9
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.6.9
Tag: v1.6.9; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-26T05:41:26Z; created_at: 2024-03-26T05:36:26Z
Release notes:
安卓5及以上专用
* 去掉港澳台和国际频道
* 解决部分情况下3、6、8等频道无法播放的问题
* 解决部分情况下启动后黑屏问题
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.6.9, which is dedicated to Android 5 and above, Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan, and international channels are removed, issues with channels 3, 6, 8 not playing in some cases are fixed, and a black screen issue on startup in some cases is resolved.

chunks.title: Release v1.7.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.7.1
Tag: v1.7.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-29T08:23:33Z; created_at: 2024-03-29T08:19:27Z
Release notes:
安卓5及以上专用
* 解决设置页更新闪退的问题
* 凤凰卫视回归
* 解决368问题
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.1, which is dedicated to Android 5 and above, a crash when updating on the settings page is fixed, Phoenix TV returns, and the 368 issue is resolved.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv

Tag: v1.7.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-29T09:08:27Z; created_at: 2024-03-29T09:04:11Z
Release notes:
通用
* 修复368
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.4, the 368 issue is fixed.

chunks.title: Release v1.7.6
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.7.6
Tag: v1.7.6; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-02T15:02:22Z; created_at: 2024-04-02T14:57:39Z
Release notes:
通用
* 临时去掉部分频道，提高频道的可用性
* 部分频道增加节目单
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.6, some channels are temporarily removed to improve channel availability, and program guides are added for some channels.

chunks.title: Release v1.7.3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.7.3
Tag: v1.7.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-03T10:51:01Z; created_at: 2024-04-03T10:46:49Z
Release notes:
安卓5及以上专用
* 临时去掉部分频道，提高频道的可用性
* 部分频道增加节目单
* 遥控器左键进入节目列表
* 遥控器右键进入菜单
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.3, which is dedicated to Android 5 and above, some channels are temporarily removed to improve channel availability, program guides are added for some channels, pressing the left button on the remote control enters the program list, and pressing the right button enters the menu.

chunks.title: Release v1.7.8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.7.8
Tag: v1.7.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-18T02:26:24Z; created_at: 2024-04-18T02:21:54Z
Release notes:
通用
* 修复播放过程中的卡顿问题
* 增加时间显示
* 频道号优化
* 遥控器左键打开频道列表
* 遥控器右键打开设置菜单
* 频道列表空白处点击隐藏频道列表
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.8, stuttering during playback is fixed, time display is added, channel numbers are optimized, pressing the left button on the remote control opens the channel list, pressing the right button opens the settings menu, and clicking on an empty area in the channel list hides it.

chunks.title: Release v1.7.5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.7.5
Tag: v1.7.5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-19T07:25:49Z; created_at: 2024-04-19T07:22:05Z
Release notes:
安卓5及以上专用
* 修复播放过程中的卡顿问题
* 增加时间显示
* 频道号优化
* 设置中增加退出按钮
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.7.5, which is dedicated to Android 5 and above, stuttering during playback is fixed, time display is added, channel numbers are optimized, and an exit button is added in the settings.

chunks.title: Release v1.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.8.0
Tag: v1.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-19T12:17:55Z; created_at: 2024-04-19T12:13:43Z
Release notes:
通用
* 修复返回键无法退出问题
* 设置中增加退出按钮
* 修改非电视上的样式
* 修复低版本闪退问题
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.8.0, the issue where the back button cannot exit is fixed, an exit button is added in the settings, the style on non-TV devices is modified, and a crash issue on lower versions is fixed.

chunks.title: Release v1.8.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.8.2, the issue of being unable to play is fixed.

chunks.title: Release v1.8.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv
Release: Release v1.8.4
Tag: v1.8.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-25T14:41:05Z; created_at: 2024-04-25T14:36:37Z
Release notes:
通用
* 解決部分情況下打開後黑屏问题
* 延长频道信息显示时间，增加信息显示长度
* 调整频道列表间距
* 其他样式优化
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.8.4, a black screen issue on opening in some cases is resolved, the display time of channel information is extended and the information display length is increased, the spacing of the channel list is adjusted, and other style optimizations are made.

chunks.title: Release v1.8.6
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lizongying/my-tv

Tag: v1.8.6; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-26T12:01:51Z; created_at: 2024-04-26T11:57:12Z
Release notes:
通用
* 增加错误显示
* 节目预告优化
* 频道列表页单击切换频道
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.8.6, error display is added, program guide is optimized, and clicking on a channel in the channel list page switches to that channel.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v1.9.0, video playback failures are reduced, and full-screen phones display centered.

* 解决卡顿问题
* 解决网格样式时，点击空白处不退出的问题
* 解决频道列表样式切换可能不生效的问题
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release v2.0.1, stuttering issues are resolved, the problem of not exiting when clicking on an empty area in grid style is fixed, and the issue of channel list style switching possibly not taking effect is resolved.

questions.query_text: In the lizongying/my-tv releases, which release adds an exit button in the settings and fixes the back button not exiting?

answer_support.answer_text: the issue where the back button cannot exit is fixed, an exit button is added in the settings

questions.query_text: Across the lizongying/my-tv releases, how does the channel list interaction change from v1.7.3 to v1.7.8?

options.text: v1.7.3 uses left button for program list and right button for menu, while v1.7.8 uses left button for channel list and right button for settings menu, and adds hiding on empty area click.
v1.7.3 removes the channel list entirely, while v1.7.8 reintroduces it with grid style.
Both versions use the same remote control mappings but v1.7.8 adds time display.
v1.7.3 adds program guides, while v1.7.8 removes them.

questions.expected_answer: v1.7.3 uses left button for program list and right button for menu, while v1.7.8 uses left button for channel list and right button for settings menu, and adds hiding on empty area click.

answer_support.answer_text: pressing the left button on the remote control enters the program list, and pressing the right button enters the menu
pressing the left button on the remote control opens the channel list, pressing the right button opens the settings menu, and clicking on an empty area in the channel list hides it

questions.query_text: In the lizongying/my-tv release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that fixes the 368 issue, (2) a release that adds time display and optimizes channel numbers, (3) a release that adds an exit button in settings and fixes the back button not exiting, (4) a release that adds support for x86 devices.

answer_support.answer_text: time display is added, channel numbers are optimized
an exit button is added in the settings, and the issue where the back button cannot exit is fixed
support for x86 devices is added
